name: Insalata Di Fava (Fava Bean Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and remove them from their skins.
2. Place the skinned beans in a pot with the onion and enough water to cover.
3. Turn the heat to medium and bring to a boil.
4. Add salt and reduce to a simmer.
5. Cover and cook until the water has almost evaporated and the beans are tender and pulpy, 20 to 25 minutes.
6. Drain the beans.
7. Mix together lemon juice, olive oil, parsley, salt, and pepper.
8. Toss with the garlic and cooked beans.
9. Serve as part of an antipasto plate or as we would serve a potato salad.
